text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to soothe this burning passion, and to
satiate this aching thirst.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't need your help. ...All I ask is that you don't
get in my way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
